summary: Ship the plan. The lock’s red SHA/tree matches the committed RED record; both assertions pin the exact pass-abort symptom through the production call-site seam. The round-26 SSOT refactor leaves no materially stale normative gate count. Simpler alternative: use one source-aware NotFound helper at the existing call sites plus the post-loop guard, but that sacrifices the Entry/Absent boundary that prevents future raw-`?` regressions.
